text.title: feature-discovery Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for feature-discovery as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent fabricates Reach values when telemetry is missing.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hallucinated Reach inflates RICE scores for unverified features. Require a data source link for every Reach value; use null when no source exists.

failure-mode.description: Agent collapses distinct jobs ("export PDF" and "share PDF") into one feature cluster.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Collapsing distinct jobs loses the granularity needed to assign effort correctly and build the right version. Require sample ticket IDs per cluster so humans can audit the grouping.

failure-mode.description: Using Kano classification from LLM-only input as the final call.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLM Kano classification is unreliable without survey data. Use it for shortlisting only; require user survey data before finalizing the classification.
